summary: List referral templates available for offer template
description: List referral templates available for offer template. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/referral_templates. Required parameters: offer_template_id, company_id. Optional parameters include name.
example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/referral_templates

Required params: offer_template_id, company_id

Optional params: name
